channel.title: The Grant Desk - Cross-disciplinary & Social Impact, UK, next 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Cross-disciplinary & Social Impact, UK, next 30 days.

item.title: SIAP: Major Individual Artists Award 2026/27 (Arts Council NI)
item.description:
Organisation: Arts Council of Northern Ireland

Location: Northern Ireland, United Kingdom. Applicants must be based in Northern Ireland.

Award: Up to GBP 15,000 per award; four awards available in 2026/27. Funded through the National Lottery Support for Individual Artists Programme (SIAP).

Duration: Supports specific projects, specialised research, personal artistic development and materials/equipment. Activity duration not specified.

Deadline: 20 Jul 2026

The Major Individual Artists award, part of Arts Council NI's National Lottery Support for Individual Artists Programme (SIAP), funds extended or ambitious work by established artists, covering specific projects, specialised research, personal artistic development, and materials/equipment. AMOUNT: four awards of up to GBP 15,000 each in 2026/27. ELIGIBILITY: established artists across all disciplines with national/international recognition who have not previously received a major award; academics and postgraduate artists are eligible if the project costs do not relate to their institutional work or studies. Applicants must contact the relevant artform officer before submission (by 10 July 2026); applications without this prior contact are ineligible. No application fee. The online application system closes precisely at the deadline and applicants must receive a confirmation email to verify successful submission. Deadline: Monday 20 July 2026, 12:00 noon.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
